recipes.title: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.description: A beautiful and tasty delicacy from Italy that will get your mouth watering.
recipes.instructions:
1. Cook the pasta in a large pot of warm, salty water.
2. Cook it till it's firm when biting.
3. Dice your guanciale pork over medium-low heat, and cook till the fat renders and the pieces are golden and crispy.
4. Turn the heat off.
5. Whisk the sauce with the eggs, grated cheese and a good amount of the cracked black pepper.

recipes.title: Chicken curry
recipes.description: A common and beloved Indian cuisine that can go with any meal.
recipes.instructions:
1. Grate the ginger and garlic using a grater.
2. Melt the coconut oil and cook the ginger and garlic in it.
3. Stir the chicken in tomato paste.
